name: Iso11783IL_TIMClearLwATable
title: Iso11783IL_TIMClearLwATable
description: Removes all LwA (lightweight authentication) keys of the LwA table of the TIM client/server. LwA keys are created while a full authentication process and act as common secret between a TIM client and a TIM server.

parameters.name: participant
parameters.description: TIM participant (TIM server or TIM client).
